meta.description: 学术论文润色数据底座，覆盖全球顶级期刊规范、引用格式规则、学术英语错误模式与多学科术语词典

abstract.structure: 非结构化单段摘要，不含引用
abstract.style: 客观陈述研究背景、方法、主要发现和意义

references.style: Nature 编号引用 [序号]，顺序排列

submission_checklist: 投稿信 (Cover Letter) 必须包含研究意义的简要陈述
代码可用性声明 (Code Availability) 如适用

science.publisher: American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS)

abstract.structure: 非结构化单段摘要，不含引用
abstract.style: 简明扼要概括研究问题、方法、结果和结论

references.style: 编号引用 [序号]，按出现顺序排列

submission_checklist: 数据和材料可用性声明
如涉及人体实验需伦理审批声明

abstract.structure: 结构化：Background / Methods / Results / Conclusions (部分期刊)
abstract.highlights: 3-5 条研究亮点 (每个 ≤ 85 字符)

ieee.publisher: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers

references.format: [序号] 作者, "标题," 期刊/会议, vol., no., pp., 月 年.

figures.placement: 浮动体，居中，标题在下方

abstract.ccs_concepts: 必须包含 CCS Concepts 分类

references.format: [1] Author. Year. Title. Journal, Vol, No, Article. DOI

figures.caption_position: 图题在图下方，表题在表上方

abstract.structure: 结构化：Background / Methodology/Principal Findings / Conclusions / Significance

data_availability.statement: 必须包含 Data Availability Statement

formatting_requirements.open_access: CC BY 4.0 许可证，收取 APC (Article Processing Charge)

apa_7th.name: APA 7th Edition

in_text_citation.multiple_sources: (Smith, 2023; Jones, 2022) — 按字母排序，分号分隔

reference_format.journal_article: Author, A. A., & Author, B. B. (Year). Title of article. *Title of Periodical, Volume*(Issue), Page-Page. https://doi.org/xxxxx
reference_format.book: Author, A. A. (Year). *Title of work: Capital letter also for subtitle*. Publisher.
reference_format.book_chapter: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of chapter. In E. E. Editor (Ed.), *Title of book* (pp. xx-xx). Publisher.
reference_format.conference: Author, A. A. (Year, Month Day). Title of paper [Paper presentation]. Conference Name, Location.
reference_format.website: Author, A. A. (Year, Month Day). Title of page. Site Name. URL
reference_format.thesis: Author, A. A. (Year). *Title of dissertation* [Doctoral dissertation/Master's thesis, Institution]. Database Name.

apa_7th.doi_rules: 始终以 https://doi.org/ 形式呈现 DOI；无 DOI 的学术文章可省略 DOI
apa_7th.hanging_indent: 每条参考文献首行顶格，后续行缩进 0.5 英寸 (1.27 cm)

mla_9th.name: MLA 9th Edition

in_text_citation.single_author: (Smith 42) — 作者姓氏 + 页码，无逗号

reference_format.journal_article: Author(s). "Title of Article." *Title of Journal*, vol. #, no. #, Year, pp. xx-xx. *Database*, DOI.
reference_format.book_chapter: Author. "Title of Chapter." *Title of Book*, edited by Editor, Publisher, Year, pp. xx-xx.
reference_format.website: Author. "Title of Webpage." *Website Name*, Publisher, Date, URL.

mla_9th.core_container: MLA 9th 强调 'Containers' 概念（如期刊是文章的 Container，数据库是期刊的第二 Container）
mla_9th.works_cited: 标题为 'Works Cited'（居中），无编号；按作者姓氏字母排序

chicago.name: Chicago Manual of Style 17th Edition
chicago.full_name: The Chicago Manual of Style (17th Edition)

notes_bibliography.description: 脚注/尾注 + 参考文献 (Notes-Bibliography)
notes_bibliography.in_text: 上标数字 `^1` 对应脚注或尾注

harvard.name: Harvard Referencing

reference_format.journal_article: Smith, A. (2023) 'Title of article', *Title of Journal*, Volume(Issue), pp. xx-xx. doi: xxxxx.
reference_format.book: Smith, A. (2023) *Title of book*. Place: Publisher.
reference_format.book_chapter: Smith, A. (2023) 'Title of chapter', in Jones, B. (ed.) *Title of book*. Place: Publisher, pp. xx-xx.
reference_format.conference: Smith, A. (2023) 'Title of paper', *Conference Proceedings*, Location, Date. Place: Publisher, pp. xx-xx.
reference_format.website: Smith, A. (2023) *Title of page*. Available at: URL (Accessed: Date).

harvard.reference_list_title: 'Reference List' 按作者姓氏字母排序
harvard.harvard_variants: 注意：各大学可能有自己的 Harvard 变体（如 Anglia Ruskin、Exeter、Leeds 等）

ieee_ref.name: IEEE Citation
ieee_ref.full_name: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers Citation Style

in_text_citation.repeated: 首次出现赋予唯一编号，后续引用使用同一编号
in_text_citation.order: 全文按引用出现先后顺序编号

reference_format.journal: [1] A. Author, "Title of paper," *Abbrev. Journal Name*, vol. X, no. X, pp. xxx-xxx, Mon. Year, doi: xxxxx.
reference_format.conference: [2] A. Author, "Title of paper," in *Proc. Conf. Name*, City, Country, Year, pp. xxx-xxx.
reference_format.book: [3] A. Author, *Title of Book*, Xth ed. City, Country: Publisher, Year.
reference_format.book_chapter: [4] A. Author, "Title of chapter," in *Title of Book*, Editor, Ed. City: Publisher, Year, ch. X, pp. xxx-xxx.
reference_format.thesis: [5] A. Author, "Title of thesis," Ph.D. dissertation, Dept., Univ., City, Country, Year.
reference_format.website: [7] A. Author. (Year, Month Day). *Title* [Online]. Available: URL

ieee_ref.abbreviation_rules: 期刊名使用 IEEE 标准缩写，作者名用首字母+姓氏（如 J. Smith），月份用前 3 字母+点（如 Jan.）

vancouver.name: Vancouver Style

in_text_citation.format: 方括号编号 [1] 或上标 ^1

reference_format.journal: 1. Author AA, Author BB. Title of article. Abbreviated Journal Name. Year;Vol(Issue):Pages.
reference_format.journal_with_doi: 1. Author AA. Title. Journal. Year;Vol:Pages. DOI
reference_format.book: 2. Author AA. Title of Book. Edition. Place: Publisher; Year.
reference_format.chapter: 3. Author AA. Title of chapter. In: Editor EE, editor. Title of Book. Place: Publisher; Year. p. xx-xx.
reference_format.website: 4. Author AA. Title [Internet]. Year [cited Year Mon Day]. Available from: URL

vancouver.author_rules: 列出前 6 位作者后加 et al.；作者格式：姓氏 + 空格 + 首字母（无标点）
vancouver.journal_abbreviation: 期刊名使用 NLM (National Library of Medicine) 标准缩写

gbt_7714.name: GB/T 7714-2015
gbt_7714.full_name: 信息与文献 参考文献著录规则 (GB/T 7714-2015)

in_text_citation.note: 同一出版物内只能选择一种体制，不可混用

reference_format.journal: [1] 作者. 题名[J]. 刊名, 年, 卷(期): 起页-止页.
reference_format.journal_english: [1] Author A A. Title[J]. Journal Name, Year, Vol(Issue): Pages.
reference_format.book: [2] 作者. 书名[M]. 版本. 出版地: 出版社, 年.
reference_format.thesis: [3] 作者. 题名[D]. 保存地: 保存单位, 年.
reference_format.conference: [4] 作者. 题名[C]//会议录名. 出版地: 出版社, 年: 起页-止页.
reference_format.patent: [5] 专利所有者. 专利题名: 专利号[P]. 公告日期.
reference_format.website: [6] 作者. 题名[EB/OL]. (发布日期)[引用日期]. 获取和访问路径.

document_type_codes.C: 会议录/论文集中析出文献

grammar_errors.pattern: 单数主语 + 复数动词 / 复数主语 + 单数动词
grammar_errors.explanation: data 在学术英语中通常视为复数（datum 的单数形式）

grammar_errors.pattern: 单数可数名词前缺少冠词
grammar_errors.good_example: The result of the experiment indicates...
grammar_errors.explanation: 单数可数名词前通常需要冠词 the/a/an

grammar_errors.pattern: 文献综述/方法描述时态混乱
grammar_errors.explanation: 一般过去时用于引用前人研究，一般现在时用于陈述客观事实
正式学术写作中避免分裂不定式

grammar_errors.pattern: 分词的逻辑主语与主句主语不一致
grammar_errors.bad_example: Analyzing the data, the results were significant.
grammar_errors.good_example: Analyzing the data, we found significant results.
grammar_errors.explanation: 分词短语的逻辑主语应与主句主语一致

grammar_errors.pattern: 缺少比较对象或比较基准
grammar_errors.good_example: This method is more accurate than the baseline approach.
grammar_errors.explanation: 比较级必须明确被比较的对象
指示代词后最好跟一个名词明确指代对象
学术写作宜直截了当，避免迂回表达

style_errors.pattern: 不必要的修饰词或重复
style_errors.bad_example: It is absolutely essential to note that...
overused_phrases: It should be pointed out that

style_errors.pattern: 使用模糊限定的弱化措辞
style_errors.bad_example: The results seem to suggest that the method might be somewhat effective.
style_errors.good_example: The results indicate that the method is effective.

style_errors.pattern: 全文大量使用被动语态导致行文呆板
style_errors.bad_example: It was found that the temperature was increased by the reaction.
style_errors.good_example: We found that the reaction increased the temperature.
style_errors.balance_tip: 方法部分可使用被动，结果和讨论部分适当使用主动语态

style_errors.pattern: 单段落超过 200 词无逻辑分隔
style_errors.rule: 每段围绕一个中心思想，建议 80-150 词，超过 200 词考虑拆分

style_errors.pattern: 段落间缺少逻辑连接词

transition_words.contrast: However / Nevertheless / In contrast / Conversely / On the other hand
transition_words.cause_effect: Therefore / Consequently / As a result / Thus / Hence
transition_words.example: For instance / For example / Specifically / In particular
transition_words.conclusion: In conclusion / Overall / In summary / Taken together

discipline_specific.explanation: parameter 是函数定义中的变量，argument 是调用时传入的实际值
incidence 是新发病例数（率），prevalence 是某一时点患病人数（率）
相关性≠因果性，相关性的结论不能暗示因果关系
全文有效数字位数应保持一致，如均保留 3 位有效数字

discipline_specific.error: 将 'nominal' 与 'real' GDP 混用
discipline_specific.explanation: nominal GDP 未经通胀调整，real GDP 已调整
gene 是遗传单位，allele 是基因的特定变体形式
accuracy（准确度）= 接近真值的程度，precision（精密度）= 重复测量的一致性
affect 主要作动词（影响），effect 主要作名词（效果/影响）

academic_writing_tone.description: 避免主观臆断和情感化表达，基于证据和数据进行陈述
academic_writing_tone.bad: We believe this is the best method.
academic_writing_tone.good: The experimental results demonstrate that this method outperforms existing approaches.

academic_writing_tone.description: 使用精确的量化表述，避免模糊限定词
用最少的词表达完整意思，删除冗余修饰
academic_writing_tone.bad: It is important to note that in the case of our study, we found...

academic_writing_tone.description: 使用正式学术词汇，避免口语和缩写
方法部分提供足够细节使他人可复现实验

paragraph_structure.ideal: 主题句 (Topic Sentence) → 支持句 (Supporting Evidence) → 分析解释 (Analysis) → 过渡句 (Transition)
paragraph_structure.intro_section: 背景 → 问题/差距 → 目标/假设 → 研究意义
paragraph_structure.methods_section: 设计 → 参与者/材料 → 流程 → 统计方法
paragraph_structure.results_section: 最核心发现 → 次要发现 → 支持数据 → 图表引用
paragraph_structure.discussion_section: 主要发现小结 → 与前人对比 → 解释机制 → 局限性 → 意义与展望

common_hedging.note: may/might 在讨论局限性时合理，在陈述结论时避免

ethical_writing.description: 任何直接抄录他人文字必须用引号并标注出处；改写也需引用来源
绝对禁止伪造、篡改或选择性报告数据。所有数据须可溯源
图像增强须作用于整幅图，不可局部修改。拼接图须标明边界
署名须反映实际贡献。荣誉作者(Guest Authorship)和幽灵作者(Ghost Authorship)均属学术不端
同一手稿不可同时投递至多个期刊
编辑/审稿人不应强迫作者引用不相关文献以提升期刊影响因子
